ntpclient_create_with_params.message0: Initialize NTP client server %1 time zone offset %2 seconds
ntpclient_create_with_params.tooltip: Initialize the NTP client object and set the server and time zone offset

ntpclient_force_update.message0: Force update of NTP client time
ntpclient_force_update.tooltip: Force immediate update of NTP time

ntpclient_get_epoch_time.tooltip: Get Unix timestamp (number of seconds since January 1, 1970)

ntpclient_get_yday.message0: Get NTP client day of the year (0-365)
ntpclient_get_yday.tooltip: Get the current day of the year (0-365)

ntpclient_get_day.message0: Get NTP client Day of the week (0-6)
ntpclient_get_day.tooltip: Get the current week (0-6), 0 means Sunday

ntpclient_is_time_set.message0: Is setting up NTP client successful?
ntpclient_is_time_set.tooltip: Check if the NTP time has been set successfully

ntpclient_set_time_offset.message0: Set NTP client time zone offset %1 seconds

ntpclient_set_update_interval.message0: Set NTP client update interval %1 milliseconds
